message:
test(json_view): add 22 edge-case tests for JsonView tokenizer and renderer (bd-2agoi)

Cover whitespace-only source, deep nesting, scientific notation, empty
keys, unicode, unclosed strings/objects/arrays, mixed-type arrays,
zero indent, error tokens, bare strings, token traits, and narrow
viewport rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
